  • Tokeh & River No. 2 Beach

Sierra Leone • West Africa

Tokeh & River No. 2 Beach

An easy Sierra Leone coast escape with striking beaches and a laid-back mood.

★ 4.6 148 reviews
Image slot Attraction Tokeh And River No2
Image slot Country Sierra Leone
Image slot Region West Africa

About this attraction

These beaches are the clearest leisure entry points for travelers who want to understand Sierra Leone’s upside as an emerging coastal destination.

How to get there

Most visitors base through Freetown and continue by road to the peninsula beaches.

Best time to visit

November to April is best for sunshine, lower humidity, and smoother road conditions.

Highlights

  • Clear sense of why this place matters in the wider destination
  • Nearby accommodation and dining ideas to make planning easier
  • Practical access, timing, and route notes before booking
  • External partner paths for checking live options and availability

Practical information

Before booking, check the time commitment, access route, permit or guide needs, season, nearby accommodation, dining rhythm, and whether the experience fits the pace of your wider trip.

Full description

These beaches are the clearest leisure entry points for travelers who want to understand Sierra Leone’s upside as an emerging coastal destination. Use this listing to decide whether the attraction deserves space in your itinerary: compare the experience, access, best timing, nearby stays, dining options, and partner booking paths before you move forward.
